title: Delay Recipe in Automations
excerpt:
Description
Add a delay option like a minute or so in automation and not just in workflow. 
What are you trying to achieve
Have the option to add delay prior to executing the next action in an automation.

posts.author: abby100a (Abby Fabela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add a delay option like a minute or so in automation and not just in workflow.

What are you trying to achieve

Have the option to add delay prior to executing the next action in an automation.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @abby100a

I upvoted your request. There is a workaround with an app called Delayed Status Change. This allows to change a status after some time another (or the same) status changes to a defined value. Although not ideal it can solve most use cases whare a delay is required.
